claims.text: The compressor reduces trace tokens by 38% while keeping all reviewer-visible citations.
The paper evaluates the compressor on one local repository.
It does not compare against a no-compression review prompt.

review_layers.text: The paper relies on one repository, so transfer to other codebases is uncertain.
evidence: Paper evidence is fixture-limited but not contradicted.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: More cases may expose rare failures.
review_layers.next_action: Defer broadening until the primary missing experiment is resolved.

review_layers.text: The paper lacks a no-compression prompt comparison.
evidence: Paper says no no-compression prompt comparison has been run.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Compression must beat the simplest uncompressed baseline.
review_layers.next_action: Compare against a no-compression review prompt.

review_layers.text: The paper should classify satellite images to prove robustness.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Compare against a no-compression review prompt
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Compare against a no-compression review prompt.
